title: 4pcs Princess Birthday Party Balloons, Pink Princess Castle & Carriage Foil Balloons for Birthday Baby Shower Bachelorette Decorations
features: Package Included: You will get 4 pieces of princess party balloons, and come with 1 ribbon and 1 straw. They are 2 pieces of castle balloons and 2 pieces of carriage balloons, which can meet your party decoration needs.

Awesome Material: This princess party balloon is mainly made of reliable aluminum film material, which is strong and durable, not easy to tear and fade, and can maintain its state for a long time after being inflated.

Beautiful Design: This party balloon mainly adopts the princess theme design of castle and carriage, which is beautiful and fashionable, making your party decoration more charming and leaving unforgettable memories.

Widely Used: Our princess party balloons are suitable for various party occasions as decorations, such as birthday parties, princess theme parties, baby showers or bachelor parties, and are very versatile.
Suitable Size: The size of our carriage balloon is 63x74cm/24.8x29in, and the size of the castle balloon is 79x65cm/31x25.5in, which is large enough to make your party atmosphere more joyful.
description: Specification: Color: as shown in the picture Material: aluminum film Product Size: carriage balloon: 63x74cm/24.8x29in castle balloon: 79x65cm/31x25.5in Package details: 4 x princess party balloons 1 x straw 1 x ribbon Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
